description: Address review findings: add outputBucket.GrantWrite IAM grant, add Lambda handler unit tests, and document case-sensitivity design decision.
steps: Step 1 - Add outputBucket.GrantWrite(processorLambda, nil, nil) in cdk-base.go after the metadataTable grant.
Step 2 - Add CDK assertion test TestLambdaHasOutputBucketWritePermission verifying the Lambda role has S3 write permissions.
Step 3 - Create lambda/processor/main_test.go with unit tests for: valid input (all 5 extensions), empty fields (audioId, bucket, objectKey), and invalid extensions.
Step 4 - Add design note comment on the ValidateInput Choice state explaining that StringMatches is case-sensitive and documenting why this is acceptable.
acceptance_criteria: outputBucket.GrantWrite is present in CDK stack
CDK test verifies Lambda has S3 write permissions on the output bucket
Lambda handler has unit tests covering valid input, empty fields, and invalid extensions
Code comment documents case-sensitivity design decision
verification: cd lambda/processor && unset NODE_OPTIONS && GOPROXY=direct go test ./...
findings: GrantWrite requires 3 arguments (grantee, objectsKeyPattern, allowedActionPatterns). All 36 CDK tests pass. All 12 Lambda handler unit tests pass. cdk synth succeeds.
